category_sources: Official README says hexd prints a human-readable hexdump and uses colours to reveal byte-value patterns.
source_facts.description says it is a colourful, human-friendly hexdump tool.
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README use "hexd".
docs_sources: Official repository includes hexd.1 manpage for command documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the primary docs surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/FireyFly/hexd; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes coloured hexdump output, terminal color behavior, and plaintext option.
source_facts.description identifies a human-friendly hexdump tool.
